descriptionShort: Archival footage of Orland Kurtenbach from 1978, predating the Richmond Sockeyes era.
descriptionLong: This 1978 video appears to predate the Richmond Sockeyes' founding in 1986. It likely documents Orland Kurtenbach, a notable BC hockey figure, though the precise context—whether game footage, interview, or archival material—is ambiguous given the early date and filename alone.
